title: Infinigen
body:
Infinigen is a vanilla friendly mod aimed to adding scary dungeons and cinematic biomes.

**Frequent developement updates on @hyperpixel.coding (Instagram)**
## 
## Features:

### Biomes:
- Haunted Woods (Concept by @_pure_ai (Instagram))
- Designed to be scary
- Spawns normal mobs and illusioners
- Custom made trunk placers
- Green particles flying around
- Green-isch fog
![The Hauted Woods Biome paired with the Insanity Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a67a52d8b4090f6d0fe28f8666ea26225f555ba1.png)
- (Planned) Redwood Forest
- (Planned) Cave Oasis (Concept by @_pure_ai (Instagram))
- (Planned) Frozen Cave (Concept by @_pure_ai (Instagram))
### Structures:
  Haunted Woods:
  - 4 Ruin varients
![One Ruin variation in the Haunted Woods Biome paired with the Insanity Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bff0e5d8fcd00d617df69ecfdefb62af78996ac.png)
  - The Stonehenge 
![The Stonehenge in the Haunted Woods Biome paired with the Insanity Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a30b65875be17f828acea589860f57c4fe25a15e.png)
  - The Haunted Temple
![The Haunted Temple entrance in the Haunted Woods Biome paired with the Insanity Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31a943fb7e9b2653459fbebd8e855142ab05dfdd.png)
![A spawner in the Haunted Temple paired with the Complementary Reimagined Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff80df176f0c80f7fb33bea62d1e1126a286b231.png)
![If you are lucky you might find these loot chambers in the Haunted Temple (Complementary Reimagined Shader)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11e37bc537fe65d4f823b98923ce1d63e757c1d9.png)

### Music:

- Depth - John Britton (Soundcloud, Pixabay) (Royalty Free)
- plays as soon as you enter the Haunted Woods Biome while not in creative mode

## Dependencies:

**This mod is only avaliable for Forge right now**

The only mod dependency is terrablender: [https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)

## Recommendations:

- Embeddium (1.20.1)
- Oculus
- Noisium
- Lithosphere
- Ferrite Core
- Epic Fight
- Bliss Shaders, Insanity Shaders

## Compatibility:

Should be compatible with pretty much any mod out there. 
## 
## Contact me:

If you need help or find any bugs or incompatibilities you can contact me on: hyperpixelcoding@gmail.com or @hyperpixel.coding (Instagram).
